arts.ttl: Wolves submit offer for Monaco’s Soungoutou Magassa
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers have submitted an offer for AS Monaco midfielder Soungoutou Magassa (21), according to a report from Foot Mercato. Magassa has been used as a rotation option at Monaco over…

arts.ttl: Friday offer to snatch Aston Villa player from rival’s clutches – Player’s head turned
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s Kosta Nedeljković has seen his playing time limited this season and has clocked in 341 minutes from nine games in all competitions. The right-back featured in Aston Villa’s FA Cup win over West Ham United and that’s been his only appearance for over a month. Nedeljković has dropped further down the pecking order The post Friday offer to snatch Aston Villa player from rival’s clutches – Player’s head turned appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Wolves welcome Aston Villa to Molineux this evening in a local grudge match. Vitor Pereira’s team are aiming to avoid a fifth straight Premier League defeat against their Midlands rivals. Wolves dropped into the relegation places last weekend, following a 1-0 defeat to Arsenal on home soil. However, it was an improved performance from Pereira’s […] The post Wolves vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Emery out to reshape Villa attack after Duran exit
arts.sum: In the week that Aston Villa confirmed their place in the last 16 of the Champions League, they also sold their top scorer. Jhon Duran’s departure will be a disappointment to some. The challenge for Unai Emery is to ensure the changes make Villa stronger.

arts.ttl: Tottenham’s €4m bid for signing rejected – Aston Villa prepare for late approach to sign player
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Aston Villa are both keen on signing Valencia’s David Otorbi. That’s according to journalist Salva Gomis, and he took to X, formerly known as Twitter, to cover Tottenham and Aston Villa interest. The 17-year-old is a product of Los Ches’ youth system and made his way into their first team last year. The post Tottenham’s €4m bid for signing rejected – Aston Villa prepare for late approach to sign player appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa XI vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa travel to take on Wolves at Molineux in an intriguing Midlands matchup this evening. Unai Emery’s side head into the contest with confidence after booking their place in the Champions League’s Round of 16. Morgan Rogers hit a hat-trick as Villa beat Celtic 4-2 to secure their place in the top eight of […] The post Aston Villa XI vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery insists 'the moment was not right' for Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Unai Emery is delighted Ollie Watkins realises that Aston Villa is the best place for him to play his football at this moment in his career after the striker told the Spaniard he was happy to stay at the club amid interest from Arsenal. "Every professional has our own ambitions in our career, but there are also moments like this in our career," Emery explained on Friday.

arts.ttl: Saturday’s briefing: Real reunion for Man City as Aston Villa eye Rashford swoop
arts.sum: Real Madrid and City will meet in the Champions League for the fifth two-legged tie in six seasons.
